attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who capitalizes on early moves that can survive to the finish, particularly when chaos disrupts organized chases.
team_tactics: Relies on breakaway survival rather than team-led setups; benefits when external factors (crashes, multiple team interests) fragment peloton chase coordination.
terrain_preference: Stages where breakaways have high survival probability; capable of winning from reduced groups when sprint teams are disrupted or disorganized.
vulnerability: Likely struggles against fully organized sprint team trains or when multiple well-resourced teams commit to sustained chasing without disruption.
key_patterns: Targets early breakaways on stages where peloton control may fracture or fail
Capitalizes on race disruptions like crashes to neutralize organized chase efforts
Shows strong form recovery timing after limited racing schedule in previous season
form_trajectory: positive: Won first 2018 race after severely limited 2017 season (only 30 racing days), demonstrating effective recovery and timing
